name: GT-HH
source: proofs/lem-bridge-polar (VALIDATED prior lemma, registry lem-bridge-polar / report lem:bridge-polar, (HH)) — TWO-HOLE: for polarised holes q_{r,s}=P(r∘s)-r∘s, ||P(q_{r,s}∘q_{u,v})|| <= C eta ||r||||s||||u||||v||. Since q_{r,s}=-h_{r,s}, equivalently ||P(h_{r,s}∘h_{u,v})|| <= C eta ||r||||s||||u||||v||.
